levelName: Level 43: Switch Statements - Number to Words
puzzleDescription: Use a switch statement to convert a numeric input (1–5) into its corresponding English word.
objective: Input a number from 1 to 5 and print the word (e.g., 1 = One, 5 = Five).
hints: Each number is a case (e.g., case 1: System.out.println("One"); break;).
Ensure the words start with a capital letter (One, Two, Three...).
